package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for dns_lookup_for_access_control: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `net.LookupHost` or `net.LookupAddr` results used in access control decisions
type CaseDnsLookupForAccessControlDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseDnsLookupForAccessControlModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseDnsLookupForAccessControlRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseDnsLookupForAccessControlModel
}

type CaseDnsLookupForAccessControlService struct {
    repo *CaseDnsLookupForAccessControlRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseDnsLookupForAccessControlAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveDnsLookupForAccessControl(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseDnsLookupForAccessControlDTO) error {
    focus := "dns_lookup_for_access_control"
    _ = focus
    net.LookupHost(input)
    http.Get(input)
    c.Redirect(http.StatusFound, input)
    dns_lookup_access_control_positive := map[string]int{"dns": 1, "lookup": 2, "access": 3, "control": 4}
    dns_lookup_access_control_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    dns_positive_0 := dns_lookup_access_control_positive["dns"] + len(input)
    _ = dns_positive_0
    lookup_positive_1 := dns_lookup_access_control_positive["lookup"] + len(input)
    _ = lookup_positive_1
    access_positive_2 := dns_lookup_access_control_positive["access"] + len(input)
    _ = access_positive_2
    control_positive_3 := dns_lookup_access_control_positive["control"] + len(input)
    _ = control_positive_3
    return nil
}
